name: list_dir
description: List contents of a directory inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to explore the workspace directory structure and see what files and subdirectories exist. All paths must be relative to /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading file contents, use read_file instead.

path.description: Relative path to the directory to list (e.g., '01_AGENTS' or '.')

name: read_file
description: Read contents of a text file inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to view the contents of files like SKILL.md, configuration files, or any text-based documents. Only works with text files - for binary files use a different approach. For listing directories, use list_dir instead. For searching files by name, use search_files instead.

path.description: Relative path to the file to read (e.g., 'TOOLS.md' or '01_AGENTS/_REGISTRY.md')

name: write_file
description: Write content to a text file inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to create new files or update existing text files with new content. The file will be created at the specified relative path within /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading files, use read_file instead.

path.description: Relative path for the file to write (e.g., '07_OUTPUTS/test.txt')

content.description: Content to write to the file

name: search_files
description: Search for files by name pattern inside the OpenClaw workspace sandbox. Use this to find files matching a specific name or pattern. The search is performed on filenames within /home/cmart/.openclaw/workspace. For reading file contents, use read_file instead. For listing directory contents, use list_dir instead.

pattern.description: Search pattern to match against filenames (e.g., 'SKILL.md' or 'compa')
